snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2025-13030 - Django-mdeditor Missing Authentication for "; content:"CVE-2025-13030"; nocase; sid:7921417; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
